## Summary

- describe the change briefly
- mention user-facing or operational impact

## Validation

- [ ] local checks run
- [ ] affected flows tested manually if applicable
- [ ] environment/config changes documented if applicable

## AI review

- [ ] Request GitHub Copilot review on this pull request
- [ ] Review Copilot comments and apply relevant suggestions
- [ ] Resolve or dismiss non-applicable Copilot comments with context

## Risk notes

- auth / permissions impact:
- env / secrets impact:
- external integrations impacted:
